hero.subtitle: Scan food with your camera, get instant calorie breakdowns, personalized workout plans, and real-time coaching — all powered by advanced AI.

features.description: From food scanning to AI coaching, every tool you need to reach your health goals lives in one powerful platform.

foodScanner.title: AI Food Scanner
foodScanner.description: Snap a photo of any meal. Our AI instantly identifies food items, estimates portion sizes, and calculates full nutrition breakdown.

analytics.title: Smart Analytics
analytics.description: Weekly and monthly charts showing your calorie trends, macronutrient ratios, weight progress, and predicted outcomes.

workoutPlans.title: Workout Plans
workoutPlans.description: AI-generated workout routines tailored to your fitness level, available equipment, and goals. Adapt in real time based on progress.

sessions.title: Coach & Doctor Sessions
sessions.description: Book 1-on-1 sessions with certified nutritionists, fitness coaches, and doctors. They monitor your data in real time.

prediction.title: Weight Prediction
prediction.description: AI models predict your weight trajectory based on your diet, exercise, and metabolism. See where you'll be in 30 days.

achievements.title: Gamified Achievements
achievements.description: Join step challenges, nutrition streaks, and transformation contests with thousands of members globally.

HowItWorks.description: From food scanning to AI coaching, every tool you need to reach your health goals lives in one powerful platform.

one.title: Set goals
one.description: Tell us your weight loss goal, dietary preferences, and fitness level. Our AI system will create a personalized plan for you in seconds.

two.title: Track everything
two.description: Weekly and monthly charts showing your calorie trends, macronutrient ratios, weight progress, and predicted outcomes.

three.title: Transform
three.description: Get AI recommendations, coach sessions, and community support. Watch your health metrics improve week by week.

coaches.description: Our coaches and doctors monitor your NutriAI data in real time and provide personalized guidance tailored exactly to your journey.

pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready. Cancel anytime.

free.name: FREE TRIAL
free.description: Everything you need to start your health transformation. No credit card required.

pro.name: PRO
pro.description: Advanced AI tools, unlimited tracking, and detailed insights for serious health goals.

premium.name: PREMIUM COACH
premium.description: Everything in Pro, plus dedicated coach/doctor sessions and priority support.

1.name: Rania K.
1.quote: Lost 8kg in 2 months! The AI food scanner is incredibly accurate. I scan every meal and it keeps me accountable. The weekly predictions kept me motivated to stay on track.

2.name: Ahmed M.
2.quote: The coach booking feature changed everything. Dr. Sara monitored my actual app data and gave me advice based on my real numbers. Felt like having a personal nutritionist at a fraction of the cost.

3.name: Layla N.
3.quote: As someone who eats Arabic food, I was skeptical about food recognition. NutriAI recognized كباب and مقلوبة perfectly! The Arabic interface support is excellent and the results are super accurate.

mobilePreview.subtitle: Available on iOS and Android. Sync with Apple Health, Google Fit, Fitbit, and 50+ devices. Real-time notifications and smart reminders keep you on track 24/7.

cta.text: Join 250,000+ people already transforming their health with NutriAI. No credit card required for the first month.

footer.description: Your AI-powered health and fitness companion. Available in Arabic and English.

bottom.tagline: Made with 💚 for healthier lives worldwide

chatbot.title: NutriAI Coach
chatbot.welcome: Hi, I can help with nutrition, workouts, and meal choices.
replies: You are under target today. Keep protein high and avoid extra liquid calories.
That meal could use more fiber and a smaller rice portion for balance.
Try a 20-minute walk after dinner to improve recovery and glucose control.
